mapper.sql: A.NIP_ALLOC_NEOSS_SEQ, A.SORDERNUM, A.REGYN, A.ODR_CLOSE_TYPE_CD , A.SAID, A.LLNUM, A.ICISOFFICESCODE, A.LACPSID , A.SUBSCNESCODE, A.SUBSCMSTIP, A.SUBSCLGIPPORTSEQ, A.SUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION , A.SUBSCLGIPPORTIP, A.SUBSCROUTERSERIALIP, A.SUBSCNEALIAS, A.CONNALIAS , A.MODELNAME, A.IP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ, A.IP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , A.IP_BLOCK, A.IPBITMASK, A.SIPADDR, A.EIPADDR , A.IPMS_SVC_SEQ, A.ASSIGN_TYPE_CD, A.EX_SVC_CD, A.SVC_USE_TYPE_CD , A.GATEWAYIP, A.INSTALLADDRESS, A.INSTALLROADADDRESS, A.WORKERID , A.WORKERNAME, A.ODRREGDT, A.ODRHOPEDT, A.CUSTNAME , A.SEX_PUSH_YN, A.NTICKET_NO_SEQ, A.PIP_PREFIX , A.REPORT_OPINION, A.RESULT_CD, A.RESULT_MSG , A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.SOFFICECODE , A.SSPEEDDESC, A.SLACPBLOCKYN , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM BIF.TB_IP_ALLOC_NEOSS_MST A

SELECT
COUNT(A.NIP_ALLOC_NEOSS_SEQ) AS CNT FROM BIF.TB_IP_ALLOC_NEOSS_MST A WHERE 1=1 AND A.SORDERNUM = #{sordernum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.ODR_CLOSE_TYPE_CD IS NULL

SELECT
FROM BIF.TB_IP_ALLOC_NEOSS_MST A WHERE 1=1 AND NIP_ALLOC_NEOSS_SEQ = (SELECT MAX(NIP_ALLOC_NEOSS_SEQ) AS NIP_ALLOC_NEOSS_SEQ FROM BIF.TB_IP_ALLOC_NEOSS_MST A )
